attributes.description: Alerts when `redis.memory.used / redis.maxmemory > 90%`. Approaching maxmemory triggers evictions or OOM.
attributes.name: [Redis OTel] Memory approaching maxmemory

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis memory approaching maxmemory

### What fired
Memory usage exceeded 90% of `maxmemory`.

### Why it matters
At 100% maxmemory, Redis either evicts keys (cache workloads) or OOMs (no eviction policy). Both are user-visible.

### Triage
1. Correlate with eviction and fragmentation trends.

### Remediation
- Raise `maxmemory` or reduce key set.

### Tuning
- 90% threshold; tune per workload.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
  AND redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL
  AND redis.maxmemory IS NOT NULL
  AND redis.maxmemory > 0
// Used memory as percentage of maxmemory
| STATS used = MAX(redis.memory.used),
        max_mem = MAX(redis.maxmemory)
  BY server.address, server.port
| EVAL usage_pct = ROUND(used / max_mem * 100.0, 2)
// Alert when usage exceeds 90%; adjust threshold as needed
| WHERE usage_pct > 90.0
| SORT usage_pct DESC
